aggregation_note: 'overall' follows the frozen ladder (cell series-equal -> regime dataset-macro -> mean over regimes). 'series_micro_descriptive' is the plain per-uid mean and is descriptive only -- it lets the biggest dataset dominate.
annotation_note: scale_warning marks cells whose sMASE is inflated by a tiny seasonal denominator, not by a bad forecast; their losses are not comparable across datasets. oracle_insample_gain_over_raw is the headroom above the No-op floor -- prefer it over gain_over_h_ref, which is inflated wherever H_ref hurt.

h_ref_behaviour_audit.reading: indistinguishable_from_raw_fraction near 1.0 means H_ref is mostly a no-op, so 'H_ref' and 'Raw' are not two independent baselines. net_vs_raw > 0 means the reference ladder is, on net, worse than doing nothing.

definition.gain_over_h_ref: pool-best minus the current reference ladder. Inflated wherever H_ref hurt, because the oracle just picks Raw back.
definition.gain_over_raw: pool-best minus the No-op floor. This is the honest headroom: space a method could actually win.
definition.h_ref_self_harm: positive means H_ref is worse than doing nothing on that cell

definition.gain_over_h_ref: pool-best minus the current reference ladder. Inflated wherever H_ref hurt, because the oracle just picks Raw back.
definition.gain_over_raw: pool-best minus the No-op floor. This is the honest headroom: space a method could actually win.
definition.h_ref_self_harm: positive means H_ref is worse than doing nothing on that cell

definition.gain_over_h_ref: pool-best minus the current reference ladder. Inflated wherever H_ref hurt, because the oracle just picks Raw back.
definition.gain_over_raw: pool-best minus the No-op floor. This is the honest headroom: space a method could actually win.
definition.h_ref_self_harm: positive means H_ref is worse than doing nothing on that cell

mechanism_diagnostics.reading: programs_indistinguishable=true means no program in the frozen pool can act on that defect. That is a capability gap in the operator library, reported as such; it is not evidence that the data has nothing to gain.

oracle_semantics.h_ref_and_oracles_are_not_selectable: The oracles choose only among pool programs. H_ref is the incumbent under test; letting the ceiling pick it would make headroom partly a statement about H_ref's quality instead of the pool's reachable space.
oracle_semantics.oracle_insample_retrained: INFLATION ENVELOPE. Same retraining, but the policy is chosen on Dev-Query itself. Reports how much of any apparent ceiling is winner's curse.
oracle_semantics.oracle_insample_untrained_counterfactual: DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, NOT A GATE INPUT. As above, selected on Dev-Query.
oracle_semantics.oracle_transfer_retrained: GATE-BEARING CEILING. The best program per (cell, scenario, dose) is chosen on Support-A; Dev-Query is then prepared with those choices, a model is TRAINED on the resulting mixed corpus (per dataset), and that model is scored. Same path a Method takes, so floor, ceiling, and method are one kind of measurement.
oracle_semantics.oracle_transfer_untrained_counterfactual: DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, NOT A GATE INPUT. The v0/v0.1 oracle: a program picked per cell, but each cell's loss read off a model trained on a corpus prepared with ONE program throughout. No model was ever fitted to the mixed corpus these picks describe, so this is not a value any method could reach. Kept only so the v0.1 report remains comparable.

definitions.diagnostic_unavailable: a reason here means the cell cannot support a saturation claim -- absence of a detected effect is not evidence of absence when mde_80 > epsilon
definitions.known_optimism: monash:traffic_hourly has singleton clusters because the pinned Monash release ships no sensor coordinates, though its 862 sensors are one road network. Its intervals are an optimistic bound; METR-LA is the spatially clean traffic read.
definitions.material_threshold: the frozen SATURATION_GAP epsilon. A gain below it is not worth an expensive method, whether or not it is statistically resolvable.
definitions.mde_80: smallest true effect detectable at alpha=0.05 two-sided with power 0.80, computed as 2.8016 * the cluster-bootstrap standard error
definitions.resampling_unit: overlap_group, not series. METR-LA's 207 sensors are 20 spatial blocks; treating them as 207 independent draws shrinks every interval by roughly sqrt(10).

power_panel_note: Effect = Raw minus the Gate-bearing retrained transfer oracle, paired per uid under CRN. A cell carrying diagnostic_unavailable contributes nothing to a saturation claim.

capability_gaps.why_uncovered: The corruption is realized in the value domain -- values are permuted inside disjoint tiles -- because the legacy Monash series carry no timestamps at all, so a real timestamp array cannot be perturbed uniformly across the roster without breaking CRN. A 're-align the timestamps' operator therefore has nothing to grip: the index is already uniform and correct. Median and smoothing programs are weak candidates at best, and they are in the pool for other mechanisms, not for this one.

`operators/registry.py` holds no changepoint-detection or segment-normalization operator. Nothing in the pool can find a break, so nothing in the pool can repair one. This is a gap in the operator library and is reported as such.

deliberately_excluded_operators.impute_ema: redundant mechanism with forward_fill; excluded before results
deliberately_excluded_operators.impute_fft: redundant mechanism with seasonal_fill; excluded before results
deliberately_excluded_operators.impute_linear: identical to canonical ingestion, which Raw already applies
deliberately_excluded_operators.minmax_norm: changes_target_space; banned from the action surface
deliberately_excluded_operators.note: This exclusion list is part of the freeze. Deciding after the fact which operators 'count' is the path by which a null becomes a discovery.
deliberately_excluded_operators.outlier_iqr: redundant mechanism with winsorize; excluded before results
deliberately_excluded_operators.outlier_mad: redundant mechanism with winsorize; excluded before results
deliberately_excluded_operators.period_complete: redundant mechanism with seasonal_fill; excluded before results
deliberately_excluded_operators.smooth_ema: redundant mechanism with denoise_savgol; excluded before results
deliberately_excluded_operators.smooth_ma: redundant mechanism with denoise_savgol; excluded before results
deliberately_excluded_operators.znorm: changes_target_space; banned from the action surface by the frozen spec

programs.note: No-op + canonical ingestion. The honest floor: what a method must beat.
Benchmark-owned lag-period fill, canonical ingestion for what it cannot reach.
Symmetric quantile clipping. Registry default limits, frozen unchanged.

Sliding median, symmetric boundary. This is the operator that project results before the benchmark called `v_median`; the canonical registry name is used here so the pool cannot drift from the operator library's single source.

STL trend+seasonal reconstruction, residual dropped. The period is passed explicitly from the frozen frequency so the operator never reaches its `_guess_period` branch, whose no-seasonality path falls back to savgol.
Savitzky-Golay, explicit `interp` endpoints. Registry defaults, frozen.
Bounded-level VisuShrink soft threshold, symmetric mode. Registry defaults.
The frozen P6 det+random fast path. Executed by the runner, not by `apply_program`, because its action is a function of the whole role's episode state rather than of one series' values.

program_pool.selection_principle: mechanism coverage, not expected performance -- the pool exists so that 'choosing' has something to choose between, which is the precondition for C1 being measurable at all

timeout_calibration_provenance.measured_on: the v0.2 per-dataset training path with the widened pool. Neither the v0 per-cell numbers nor the v0.1 role-pooled numbers transfer: the training pool changed size in both directions and the pool went from four programs to nine plus two retrained oracles.
timeout_calibration_provenance.trainer_scope: closed_form_only -- Adam and LSTM must be calibrated separately

training_unit.spec_gap_note: The frozen spec fixes trainer internals but never fixed the training pool's scope. v0 sliced by dataset x regime (leaking the private regime tag); v0.1 pooled the whole role (coupling datasets through shared weights). v0.2 fixes the scope explicitly at dataset, which is public metadata.
